title: erigeron × rhaeticus
intro: Erigeron × rhaeticus, also known as Rhaetic Fleabane, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family, resulting from the cross between Erigeron alpinus and Erigeron borealis. The medicinal properties of Erigeron × rhaeticus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
